name: Alleycat
description: You stalk and ambush prey in dark alleys and isolated areas, using violence or intimidation.

merit.name: Criminal Contacts
merit.description: You know people in the criminal underworld who can fence goods, provide weapons, or look the other way.

flaw.name: Prey Exclusion (children)
flaw.description: You refuse to feed on children. Doing so accidentally triggers a Humanity roll.

name: Bagger
description: You acquire blood bags from hospitals, blood banks, or the black market rather than hunting live prey.

merit.name: Iron Gullet
merit.description: You can feed on cold or rancid blood without penalty.

flaw.name: Enemy (Supplier)
flaw.description: Someone in your supply chain is unreliable or dangerous.

name: Blood Leech
description: You feed on other vampires — a dangerous and despised practice, but the blood is potent.

flaw.name: Shunned
flaw.description: Kindred society knows or suspects what you do. They avoid you.

name: Cleaver
description: You maintain a mortal family or close social group and feed from them, keeping your nature hidden.

merit.name: Herd (Family)
merit.description: Your mortal family serves as a reliable feeding source.

flaw.name: Dark Secret (Cleaver)
flaw.description: Kindred society forbids maintaining mortal attachments. If discovered, you face punishment.

name: Consensualist
description: You only feed from willing vessels who know what you are and consent to being fed upon.

merit.name: Farmer
merit.description: You feed exclusively from willing vessels. Reduces Stain risk.

flaw.name: Prey Exclusion (unwilling)
flaw.description: You cannot feed without consent. Emergency feeding causes a Stain.

name: Farmer
description: You feed exclusively on animals, refusing human blood on ethical grounds.

flaw.name: Vegan
flaw.description: You feed only on animals. Human blood tastes repulsive. Hunger can never drop below 1.

name: Osiris
description: You lead a cult, fan club, or congregation and feed from your devoted followers.

merit.name: Herd (Cultists)
merit.description: Your cult or fan following provides reliable feeding.

flaw.name: Fame (Cult Leader)
flaw.description: Your public presence as a leader makes you conspicuous to the Second Inquisition.

name: Sandman
description: You feed on sleeping victims, slipping in and out without ever being noticed.

merit.name: Sandman
merit.description: +2 dice to Stealth when approaching sleeping victims.

name: Scene Queen
description: You feed at events, parties, and gatherings — clubs, concerts, raves, galleries — where willing or inebriated vessels are plentiful.

merit.name: Fame (Scene)
merit.description: You're known in the local nightlife scene.

flaw.name: Influence (Dependent)
flaw.description: Your feeding depends on maintaining your social status.

name: Siren
description: You use seduction and charm to lure victims, feeding during intimate encounters.

merit.name: Beautiful
merit.description: +1 die to Social pools when appearance matters.

flaw.name: Enemy (Spurned Lover)
flaw.description: A former vessel became obsessed and now stalks or threatens you.
